features.problem: Users find it difficult to navigate the main dashboard.
features.why_it_matters: If not solved, users will continue to experience frustration, leading to reduced engagement and higher churn rates.
features.solution: Redesign the dashboard with a clean, intuitive layout that emphasizes key features and simplifies navigation.
user_flow: User logs into the platform and lands on the redesigned dashboard.
Key features are prominently displayed with clear labels and icons.
User can easily access frequently used functions through a streamlined menu.
Help and support options are clearly visible for quick access.
features.expected_impact: Increases user satisfaction by 30% and reduces navigation-related support tickets by 50%

features.problem: Low adoption rates for new features due to poor discoverability.
features.why_it_matters: If not solved, users will remain unaware of valuable features, leading to underutilization and missed opportunities.
features.solution: Implement a guided tour for new features, add tooltips, and create a dedicated 'What's New' section.
user_flow: User logs in and sees a pop-up notification about new features.
User clicks on the notification to start a guided tour of the new features.
Tooltips appear when hovering over new features, providing quick explanations.
User can access the 'What's New' section from the help menu for detailed information.
User can mark features as 'learned' to hide future notifications.
features.expected_impact: Increases feature adoption by 40% and reduces user confusion by 25%

features.problem: Competitors offer similar features with better performance.
features.why_it_matters: If not solved, users will continue to switch to competitors due to slower load times and less reliable service.
features.solution: Optimize backend processes, reduce latency, and implement caching strategies to improve load times and reliability.
user_flow: User performs actions on the platform, such as loading pages or submitting forms.
The system processes requests faster, reducing wait times.
User notices improved performance and reliability in their daily interactions.
User receives notifications about performance improvements and system optimizations.
features.expected_impact: Reduces average load times by 50% and improves system reliability by 99.9%

features.problem: Users report feeling unsupported and ignored.
features.why_it_matters: If not solved, users will continue to feel neglected, leading to higher churn rates and negative reviews.
features.solution: Develop an AI chatbot that provides personalized support, answers common questions, and routes complex issues to human agents.
user_flow: User clicks on the support icon to open the chatbot interface.
Chatbot greets the user and asks for the nature of the issue.
Chatbot provides immediate solutions or guides the user through troubleshooting steps.
For complex issues, the chatbot routes the user to a human agent with context.
User receives follow-up emails with additional resources and support.
features.expected_impact: Reduces support ticket volume by 60% and increases customer satisfaction by 40%
